text.title: Weekly Growth Review Rhythm Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Weekly Growth Review Rhythm output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: metrics populated with a typed value
hypothesis_log_url populated with a typed value
decision_template populated with a typed value
review_slot populated with a typed value
quarterly_revisit_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
